question_X: Is your family still living in the neighborhood?
answer_Y: Just down the street.
question_X_cz: Bydlí tvoje rodina pořád u nás ve čtvrti?

question_X: Have you stayed in touch with anyone from school?
answer_Y: I really haven't
question_X_cz: Zůstal jsi v kontaktu s někým ze školy?

question_X: Are your mum and dad still alive ?
answer_Y: I'm an orphan.
question_X_cz: Žijí tvoje máma a táta ještě?

question_X: Do your remember our block fondly?
answer_Y: I enjoyed living there
question_X_cz: Vzpomínáš na naši ulici v dobrém?
answer_Y_cz: Bydlelo se mi tam moc dobře.

question_X: Does it feel strange to see me again?
answer_Y: It's weird.
question_X_cz: Je ti divné mě zase vidět?

question_X: Are your parents still living in your childhood house?
answer_Y: They moved last year
question_X_cz: Bydlí tvoji rodiče pořád v domě, kde jste vyrůstali?

question_X: Have you gone by to see your old house?
answer_Y: I saw they tore it down.
question_X_cz: Byl ses podívat na váš starý dům?

question_X: Do you still play piano?
answer_Y: I became a professional.
question_X_cz: Hraješ pořád na klavír?

question_X: D you have plans for later?
answer_Y: My slate is full for my whole visit here.
question_X_cz: Máš na později nějaké plány?
answer_Y_cz: Mám úplně plno po celou dobu, co tu budu.

question_X: Have you stayed in contact with any of our other friends?
answer_Y: There are a few a speak to online.
question_X_cz: Zůstala jsi v kontaktu s někým z našich dalších kamarádů?
answer_Y_cz: S pár lidmi si píšu na internetu.

question_X: Are you working nearby?
answer_Y: I work in this building.
question_X_cz: Pracuješ tady někde poblíž?

question_X: Does it feel strange to see me again?
answer_Y: If feels great to see you again.
question_X_cz: Je ti divné mě zase vidět?
answer_Y_cz: Je to skvělý pocit tě znovu vidět.

question_X: Does your mom still make those delicious chocolate chip cookies?
answer_Y: She started a business selling them.
question_X_cz: Peče tvoje máma pořád ty skvělé sušenky s čokoládou?

question_X: Is everything good with you?
answer_Y: I've been very ill.
question_X_cz: Daří se ti dobře?

question_X: Would you like to exchange numbers?
answer_Y: I'll get my contacts open here.
question_X_cz: Chceš si vyměnit čísla?

question_X: Do you see any of our old friends?
answer_Y: I haven't seen anyone else yet.
question_X_cz: Vídáš někoho z našich starých známých?

question_X: Are you still living in the same house?
answer_Y: There are condos where the house was now.
question_X_cz: Bydlíš pořád ve stejném domě?
answer_Y_cz: Tam, kde stál náš dům, jsou teď bytovky.

question_X: Are you still in contact with the other neighbors?
answer_Y: some of them I am
question_X_cz: Jsi pořád v kontaktu s ostatními sousedy?

question_X: Do you still live with your parents?
answer_Y: They moved.
question_X_cz: Bydlíš pořád u rodičů?

question_X: Do you have kids already?
answer_Y: I'm kid free at the moment
question_X_cz: Už máš děti?

question_X: Have you been living here?
answer_Y: I've been here a few months
question_X_cz: Bydlíš tady?

question_X: Can I buy you a drink?
answer_Y: I am not stopping you.
question_X_cz: Můžu tě pozvat na skleničku?

question_X: Do you have kids?
answer_Y: My daughter is five years old.
question_X_cz: Máš děti?

question_X: Does your mom still make those delicious chocolate chip cookies?
answer_Y: She does!
question_X_cz: Peče tvoje máma pořád ty skvělé sušenky s čokoládou?

question_X: Did you get your dream job?
answer_Y: sadly I didn't
question_X_cz: Dostal jsi svou vysněnou práci?

question_X: Do you have any children ?
answer_Y: I am kid free at the moment
question_X_cz: Máš nějaké děti?

question_X: Are you living in the city now?
answer_Y: I still need to take a train in from home.
question_X_cz: Bydlíš teď ve městě?

question_X: Are you single?
answer_Y: I've been married for a few years.
question_X_cz: Jsi nezadaný?

question_X: Want to go grab coffee and catch up?
answer_Y: I think I have a little time.
question_X_cz: Nechceš zajít na kafe a probrat, co je nového?

question_X: Are you still working as a lawyer?
answer_Y: I'm now a senior partner.
question_X_cz: Pracuješ pořád jako právník?

question_X: Did you marry your high school sweetheart?
answer_Y: I wasn't that fortunate.
question_X_cz: Vzal jsi si svou lásku ze střední?

question_X: Do you still like McDonald's?
answer_Y: I gave up junk food.
question_X_cz: Máš pořád rád McDonald?

question_X: D you have plans for later?
answer_Y: I'm going to help plan a funeral.
question_X_cz: Máš na později nějaké plány?

question_X: Is it true you got married last year?
answer_Y: I have a  wedding ring to prove it.
question_X_cz: Je pravda, že ses loni vdala?
answer_Y_cz: Můj snubní prstýnek je toho důkazem.

question_X: Do you have a house?
answer_Y: We are in a 9th floor apartment.
question_X_cz: Máš dům?
answer_Y_cz: Bydlíme v bytě v devátém patře.

question_X: Have you been to the old neighborhood in the last year?
answer_Y: Several times, actually.
question_X_cz: Byl ses za poslední rok podívat v naší staré čtvrti?

question_X: Are you going to the high school reunion in June?
answer_Y: I can't, I have a wedding to attend.
question_X_cz: Půjdeš v červnu na sraz ze střední?

question_X: You want to catch up over coffee?
answer_Y: I'd enjoy a coffee.
question_X_cz: Chceš probrat, co je nového, u kafe?

question_X: Do you know what happened to Jimmy after he moved away?
answer_Y: I haven't heard from him in years.
question_X_cz: Víš, co se stalo s Jimmym potom, co se odstěhoval?
answer_Y_cz: Už roky jsem o něm neslyšel.

question_X: Has it been six years since we last saw each other?
answer_Y: That's exactly how long it's been.
question_X_cz: Je to už šest let, co jsme se viděli naposled?

question_X: Do you remember me?
answer_Y: I could never forget my best friend.
question_X_cz: Pamatuješ si na mě?
answer_Y_cz: Na svoji nejlepší kamarádku bych nikdy nezapomněla.

question_X: Have you stayed in touch with anyone from school?
answer_Y: I haven't heard from anyone in years.
question_X_cz: Zůstal jsi v kontaktu s někým ze školy?
answer_Y_cz: O nikom jsem už roky neslyšel.

question_X: Have a nice house yet?
answer_Y: We just bought one down the road from here.
question_X_cz: Už máte nějaký pěkný dům?
answer_Y_cz: Zrovna jsme jeden koupili kousek odsud.

question_X: Are you still into sci fi movies?
answer_Y: I'm not a fan anymore
question_X_cz: Pořád tě berou sci-fi filmy?

question_X: Would you live there again if you had the chance?
answer_Y: I have no desire to move back.
question_X_cz: Bydlel bys tam znovu, kdybys měl tu možnost?

question_X: Have you talked to anyone else from our childhood?
answer_Y: I haven't for a number of years
question_X_cz: Mluvila jsi s někým jiným z našeho dětství?

question_X: Are you still in touch with anyone from the neighbourhood?
answer_Y: I meet up with a few of them at least once a year.
question_X_cz: Jsi v kontaktu s někým z naší čtvrti?
answer_Y_cz: S pár lidmi se aspoň jednou ročně vídám.

question_X: Are your brothers and sisters nearby?
answer_Y: they are all over the place
question_X_cz: Máš sourozence někde poblíž?

question_X: Do you like the changes around town?
answer_Y: I miss the old stuff.
question_X_cz: Líbí se ti, jak se to tady změnilo?
answer_Y_cz: Stýská se mi po tom, jak to bylo dřív.

question_X: Do you eat here often?
answer_Y: I think I have my own table in the corner.
question_X_cz: Jíš tady často?
answer_Y_cz: Myslím, že tu mám v rohu vlastní stůl.

question_X: Did you go to college abroad?
answer_Y: I went to Germany.
question_X_cz: Chodil jsi na vejšku do ciziny?

question_X: Is it true you adopted four children?
answer_Y: I only have the one son.
question_X_cz: Je pravda, že jsi adoptoval čtyři děti?

question_X: Can you still do that funny thing with your tongue?
answer_Y: It's genetic, so I'll probably always be able to.
question_X_cz: Ještě pořád umíš tu vtipnou věc s jazykem?
answer_Y_cz: Je to v genech, takže to asi budu umět vždycky.

question_X: Do you still live around here?
answer_Y: I'm just visiting.
question_X_cz: Pořád tu bydlíš?

question_X: Is that really you?
answer_Y: It's me!
question_X_cz: Jsi to fakt ty?
